title: Keys to my heart (Korean Movie, English Sub)

variation_files.prompt: A low-angle, close-up shot of a person’s feet wearing the sneaker, standing on a smooth, light-gray concrete floor. The person is wearing cuffed blue jeans with frayed hems, and a sparkling silver anklet adorns the right ankle. The sneaker is positioned naturally, with the left foot slightly forward and the right foot slightly back, showcasing the side profile and top view. The background is a plain, solid white wall, creating a clean and minimalist setting. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the texture of the sneaker and the fabric of the jeans without harsh shadows. The overall composition focuses on the casual, everyday wearability of the sneaker in a relaxed, urban-style context.

A split-screen composition featuring two views of the sneaker worn on feet, positioned side by side against a plain white background. The left view shows a front-three-quarter angle of the sneaker, highlighting the lacing and upper design, while the right view presents a direct front-facing angle. The wearer is dressed in cuffed blue denim jeans with frayed hems, and a sparkling ankle chain is visible on the left ankle. The lighting is bright and even, emphasizing the texture of the fabric and the clean lines of the footwear. The overall presentation is clean, minimal, and focused on the product in a natural, lifestyle context.

A close-up shot of a person's lower legs and feet wearing the sneaker, standing on a smooth, gray tiled floor. The person is wearing cuffed blue denim jeans with frayed hems, and a delicate silver anklet adorns the right ankle. The sneaker is positioned at a slight angle, showcasing the side profile with the heel slightly raised. The background is a plain, light gray wall, creating a clean and minimalistic setting. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the texture of the jeans and the sleek design of the sneaker. The overall composition focuses on the casual, everyday wearability of the product.

title: The Umbrellas of Cherbourg (The Criterion Collection) [Blu-ray]

variation_files.prompt: A close-up cinematic scene featuring a man and a woman in an intimate moment, with the man leaning in to kiss the woman’s cheek as she smiles gently with her eyes closed. The woman has blonde hair styled with a yellow hair accessory and wears a soft pink textured sweater. The man is dressed in a light beige jacket over a pink shirt with a striped collar. The background is dark and out of focus, with faint warm lights and indistinct shapes suggesting a nighttime urban or indoor setting. The lighting is soft and warm, highlighting the couple’s faces and creating a romantic, nostalgic atmosphere. The composition centers on the two figures, capturing a tender, emotional interaction.

A wide horizontal shot of five women standing closely together in a dry, wooded outdoor environment with bare trees and golden-brown foliage in the background. The group is arranged in a slightly staggered line, facing forward with tense, concerned expressions. Each woman is dressed in casual, rugged outdoor clothing including jackets, t-shirts, jeans, and backpacks. The woman on the far right holds a crumpled, stained paper map in her hands. The lighting is natural and diffused, casting soft shadows, with a warm, earthy color tone across the scene. The overall composition conveys a sense of suspense and urgency.

A close-up shot of two women in a tense, fearful moment in a forest setting. The woman on the left has her hand covering her mouth, eyes wide with terror, while the woman on the right clutches her from behind, her face contorted in shock and fear, looking off to the side. They are positioned in the foreground, with dry earth and blurred trees in the background, suggesting a remote, outdoor environment. The lighting is natural and muted, casting soft shadows and giving the scene a gritty, realistic tone. A small tent is partially visible in the background on the right. The overall composition focuses on their expressions and physical proximity, conveying urgency and danger.
